title: France Schengen Short-Stay Visa Application
description: Apply online via France-Visas (the joint online service of the Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs and the Ministry of the Interior) for a Schengen short-stay visa ("visa de court sejour", up to 90 days in any 180-day period) to visit France (and the wider Schengen area) for tourism, business, family/friend visits, or other permitted short-stay purposes. The France-Visas online form collects the same data as the harmonised Schengen application form (CERFA N degree 14076*05, the standard form used across all Schengen states), and produces a printed, signed copy the applicant brings to an in-person appointment at a visa application centre (VFS Global, TLScontact, or CAPAGO, depending on location) or a French consulate/embassy, where biometrics (fingerprints and photo) are collected and supporting documents are checked; this document models only the preceding online data-entry step, not the appointment itself. This document models an adult third-country national applying for themselves for a standard short-stay visa. Out of scope: the long-stay national visa (CERFA N degree 14571, "visa de long sejour", for stays over 90 days, e.g. work, study, or family reunification visas); the parallel, narrower application pathway for a family member of an EU/EEA/Swiss/UK national exercising free-movement rights (CERFA boxes 17-18), which is exempt from several of the fields modelled here; an application made by a parent/legal guardian on behalf of a minor (CERFA box 10); the separate short-stay visa form for French overseas territories (DROM-CTOM, CERFA N degree 15934); and an application made through a proxy/representative. It does not submit the application; the live france-visas.gouv.fr source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: France-Visas (Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs / Ministry of the Interior)

source.documentRef: Formulaire harmonise de demande de visa Schengen, CERFA N°14076*05 ("Demande de visa Schengen" / "Application for Schengen Visa")

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema opening France's first Visa-vertical document, closing the FR x Visa coverage gap identified by the GOV-756 and GOV-763 audits. france-visas.gouv.fr itself returns an interstitial bot-check page ('One moment please') on direct fetch of both its guidance pages and its own hosted copy of the CERFA form (same access-block class as several other jurisdictions' portals already recorded in this registry). The authoritative field-by-field source used instead is the identical CERFA 14076*05 PDF mirrored by formulaires.service-public.gouv.fr (France's official public-service forms portal, itself a gouv.fr property), fetched directly with no access block and extracted via the reused pdfjs-dist technique. Process/flow context (online form, appointment at a visa centre, biometrics, five-step process) came from service-public.gouv.fr's English guidance and independent third-party visa-centre operator descriptions (TLScontact) of the same official process, since france-visas.gouv.fr's own process pages were equally inaccessible. Status remains 'draft' pending a field-by-field pass against the live, authenticated france-visas.gouv.fr online form itself. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: requiresSchengenVisa
fields.label: Does your nationality and purpose of travel require a Schengen short-stay visa before travelling to France?
fields.description: Determined using France-Visas' own online 'visa wizard' (assistant-visa) tool before starting an application. True for a non-visa-exempt third-country national making a short stay (up to 90 days in any 180-day period). If false, this document does not apply — the traveller is visa-exempt, or needs the long-stay national visa instead.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Surname (family name)
fields.description: As it appears on the travel document used to apply. CERFA box 1.

fields.name: birthSurname
fields.label: Surname at birth (if different, e.g. maiden name)
fields.description: Prior family name(s), if different from the current surname. CERFA box 2.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s) (given names)
fields.description: As it appears on the travel document. CERFA box 3.

fields.name: currentNationality
fields.label: Current nationality
fields.description: Determines whether this Schengen short-stay pathway (rather than visa-free entry) applies.

fields.name: nationalityAtBirthIfDifferent
fields.label: Nationality at birth, if different
fields.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, box 7 ('Nationalite a la naissance, si differente')

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: male / female / other, as the harmonised form's three checkboxes.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.description: single = celibataire. married = marie(e). registered_partnership = partenariat enregistre. separated = separe(e). divorced = divorce(e). widowed = veuf/veuve. other = any other status (to be specified).

fields.name: maritalStatusOtherDescription
fields.label: If marital status is 'other', please specify

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: Type of travel document
fields.description: ordinary_passport = passeport ordinaire. diplomatic_passport = passeport diplomatique. service_passport = passeport de service. official_passport = passeport officiel. special_passport = passeport special. other = any other travel document (to be specified).

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeOtherDescription
fields.label: If travel document type is 'other', please specify
fields.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, box 12 ('Autre document de voyage (a preciser)')

fields.name: travelDocumentExpiryDate
fields.label: Travel document valid until (expiry date)
fields.description: Must remain valid for the intended stay (in practice, at least 3 months beyond the intended departure from the Schengen area).

fields.name: residesInCountryOtherThanNationality
fields.label: Do you reside in a country other than your country of nationality?

fields.name: currentOccupation
fields.label: Current occupation
fields.description: Not required for an applicant applying as the family member of an EU/EEA/Swiss/UK national (out of scope for this document — see description). CERFA marks this box with an asterisk (*) accordingly.

fields.name: employerOrEducationEstablishmentDetails
fields.label: Employer's name, address and telephone number (students: name and address of educational establishment)

fields.name: purposeOfJourney
fields.label: Purpose(s) of the journey
fields.description: tourism. business. family_or_friends_visit. culture. sports. official_visit. medical_reasons. study. airport_transit. other.

fields.name: purposeOfJourneyOtherDescription
fields.label: If purpose of journey is 'other', please specify

fields.name: additionalPurposeInformation
fields.label: Additional information on the purpose of the journey

fields.name: otherDestinationMemberStates
fields.label: Other destination Member State(s), if applicable

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequested
fields.label: Number of entries requested
fields.description: one = single entry. two = two entries. multiple = multiple entries.

fields.name: intendedFirstArrivalDate
fields.label: Intended date of arrival for the first intended stay in the Schengen area

fields.name: intendedDepartureAfterFirstStayDate
fields.label: Intended date of departure from the Schengen area after the first intended stay

fields.name: fingerprintsCollectedPreviously
fields.label: Have your fingerprints been collected previously for a Schengen visa application?

fields.name: fingerprintsCollectionDateIfKnown
fields.label: Date fingerprints were collected, if known

fields.name: finalDestinationEntryPermitDetails
fields.label: Entry permit for the final destination country, if applicable (issuing authority, valid from/until)

fields.name: invitingPersonOrHotelName
fields.label: Name of the inviting person(s) in the Member State(s), or name of the hotel(s)/temporary accommodation
fields.description: Not required for an applicant applying as the family member of an EU/EEA/Swiss/UK national (out of scope — see description). CERFA marks this box with an asterisk (*) accordingly.

fields.name: invitingPersonOrHotelContactDetails
fields.label: Address, email address and telephone number of the inviting person(s)/hotel(s)/temporary accommodation

fields.name: hostOrganizationNameAddressPhone
fields.label: Name, address and telephone number of the host company/organisation, if applicable

fields.name: hostOrganizationContactPersonDetails
fields.label: Name, address, telephone number and email address of the contact person at the host company/organisation, if applicable

fields.name: travelCostsFundedBy
fields.label: Cost of travelling and subsistence during the stay is financed by
fields.description: applicant = the applicant themselves. sponsor = a sponsor (host, company, or organisation).

fields.name: applicantMeansOfSubsistence
fields.label: Applicant's own means of subsistence (select all that apply)
fields.description: Modelled as a comma-separated list of: cash, travellers_cheques, credit_card, prepaid_accommodation, prepaid_transport, other — multi-select-as-string treatment, pending GSP-0009 (see e.g. us/uscis/travel-document-i131).

fields.name: sponsorDetails
fields.label: Name/reference of the sponsor (host, company, or organisation) funding the trip
fields.description: The form allows referencing the person/organisation already named in box 30 or 31, or naming another sponsor.

fields.name: sponsorMeansOfSubsistence
fields.label: Sponsor's means of subsistence provided (select all that apply)
fields.description: Modelled as a comma-separated list of: cash, accommodation_provided, all_expenses_covered, prepaid_transport, other — multi-select-as-string treatment, pending GSP-0009.

fields.name: formCompletedByThirdParty
fields.label: Was this application form completed by someone other than the applicant?

fields.name: thirdPartyPreparerName
fields.label: Name of the person who completed the form, if not the applicant

fields.name: thirdPartyPreparerContactDetails
fields.label: Address, email address and telephone number of the person who completed the form

documents.label: Copy of the travel document (biographic page)
documents.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, administration section 'Documents justificatifs' — 'Document de voyage'

documents.label: Evidence of means of subsistence
documents.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, administration section 'Documents justificatifs' — 'Moyens de subsistance'

documents.label: Invitation letter or proof of accommodation
Travel medical insurance certificate
documents.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, administration section 'Documents justificatifs' — 'Assurance maladie en voyage'; covering at least EUR 30,000 and valid throughout the Schengen area, per the Schengen visa code

documents.label: Evidence of means of transport (e.g. flight reservation or itinerary)
documents.sourceRef: CERFA 14076*05, administration section 'Documents justificatifs' — 'Moyen de transport'

documents.label: Visa fee payment receipt
documents.sourceRef: france-visas.gouv.fr fee schedule ('frais-de-visa') — standard adult short-stay visa fee, EUR 90 (reduced/waived rates apply for children and certain categories, not modelled here)

documents.label: Signed applicant declaration
documents.statement: I am aware and I consent that, for the examination of my application, the data required in this application form, my photograph and, if applicable, my fingerprints are compulsorily to be collected, and to the transmission of data concerning my application to the relevant authorities of the Member States and processing of such data by these authorities. I declare that, to the best of my knowledge, all particulars supplied by me are correct and complete. I am aware that any false statement will lead to my application being rejected or to the annulment of a visa already granted and may also render me liable to prosecution under the law of the Member State which deals with the application. I undertake to leave the territory of the Member States before the expiry of the visa, if granted.
